text.en:
If your Army Faction is **GENESTEALER CULTS**, you start the battle with a number of Resurgence points, depending on the battle size, as shown below.

■ **Incursion**: 6 Resurgence points
■ **Strike Force**: 10 Resurgence points
■ **Onslaught**: 14 Resurgence points

Each time a unit from your army is destroyed, if every model in that unit has this ability, you can spend the relevant number of Resurgence points shown below based on that unit’s Starting Strength.

If you do:

■ Add a new unit to your army identical to your destroyed unit, in Cult Ambush, at its Starting Strength, with all of its wounds remaining and any **[ONE SHOT]** weapons those models are equipped with considered as not having been shot.
■ Place one Cult Ambush marker (see below) anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units (if this is not possible, no marker is placed).

Cult Ambush is a type of Strategic Reserves. Units in Cult Ambush cannot be targeted with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem, but can be set up on the battlefield using a Cult Ambush marker as described below, or by following the rules for Strategic Reserves in a subsequent turn. Units in Cult Ambush are not automically destroyed at the end of the third battle round.

Use a circular 32mm diameter marker for Cult Ambush markers. If an enemy model (excluding **AIRCRAFT**) ends any kind of move within 8" of a Cult Ambush marker you placed, that Cult Ambush marker is removed from the battlefield. At the end of your opponent’s next Movement phase, for each of your Cult Ambush markers still on the battlefield, you can select one unit from your army that is in Cult Ambush to make an **ingress move**. For that **ingress move**, set that unit up with at least one model in that unit in base contact with that Cult Ambush marker and all other models placed wholly within 3" of that Cult Ambush marker (that Cult Ambush marker is then removed from the battlefield). Units in Cult Ambush can make an **ingress move** in the first battle round using this rule.

Each time an **ASTRA MILITARUM** unit from your army (see below) is selected to shoot, you can select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to that unit. If you do, until the end of the phase, models in that **ASTRA MILITARUM** unit can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target) and that enemy unit is caught in overlapping fire. While an enemy unit is caught in overlapping fire, each time a **GENESTEALER CULTS** model from your army targets that enemy unit with a ranged attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.
You can include **ASTRA MILITARUM** units in your army, even though they do not have the **GENESTEALER CULTS** Faction keyword. The combined points cost of such units you can include in your army is:

A **GENESTEALER CULTS** model must be your **WARLORD**, and **ASTRA MILITARUM** models from your army lose the Voice of Command ability if they have it. You cannot include units with any of the following keywords in your army using this rule: **AIRCRAFT**; **COMMISSAR**; **EPIC HERO**; **MILITARUM TEMPESTUS**; **OGRYN**; **RATLING**; **TECH-PRIEST ENGINSEER**; **MINISTORUM PRIEST**.

At the end of your opponent’s Fight phase, friendly unengaged Purestrain Genestealer units can be placed in strategic reserves. This detachment has the PURESTRAIN tag and cannot be taken with another PURESTRAIN detachment.
text.de: Am Ende der Nahkampfphase deines Gegners können befreundete Reinerbige-Symbionten-Einheiten, die nicht im Nahkampf sind, in die strategische Reserve versetzt werden. Dieses Kontingent hat die Kennzeichnung Reinerbig und kann nicht zusammen mit einem anderen Kontingent mit der Kennzeichnung Reinerbig gewählt werden.
text.es: Al final de la fase de combate del oponente, las unidades Genestealers Puros amigas no trabadas pueden colocarse en la reserva estratégica. Este destacamento tiene la etiqueta PUROS y no puede incluirse junto a otro destacamento PUROS.
text.fr: À la fin de la phase de Combat adverse, les unités de Genestealers Pure-souche amies non engagée peuvent être placées en réserve stratégique>. Ce détachement a l’étiquette Pure-souche et ne peut pas être pris avec un autre détachement de Pure-souche.
text.it: Alla fine della fase di Combattimento dell’avversario le unità di Genoraptor Puri non ingaggiate amiche possono essere collocate nelle riserve strategiche. Questo distaccamento ha il descrittore Ceppo Puro e non può essere preso con un altro distaccamento Ceppo Puro.
text.ja: 敵軍側白兵フェイズ終了時、非接敵状態の味方ピュアストレイン・ジーンスティーラー・ユニットは戦略的予備戦力に配置することができる。 このデタッチメントはピュアストレインタグを持ち、他のピュアストレインタグを持つデタッチメントと同時に編制できない。
text.ko: 상대의 백병전 페이즈 종료 시, 교전 상태가 아닌 아군 순종 진스틸러 유닛을 전략 예비대에 넣을 수 있습니다. 이 디태치먼트에 순종 태그가 부여되며 다른 순종 디태치먼트와 함께 선택할 수 없습니다.
text.zh: 在对手的近战阶段结束时，不处于交战状态的己方纯种基因窃取者单位可以被放入战略预备队。 本分遣队拥有纯种标签，并且不能与另一个拥有纯种标签的分遣队被一同纳入军队中。

text.en: Add 1 to Charge rolls made for **ABERRANTS**, **BIOPHAGUS** and **PURESTRAIN GENESTEALERS** units from your army. In addition, each time such a unit is selected to fight, if it made a Charge move this turn, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit.

While a **GENESTEALER CULTS MOUNTED**/**VEHICLE** model from your army is not Battle-shocked, add 1 to its Objective Control characteristic. In addition, at the end of your Command phase, if one or more **ATALAN JACKALS** units from your army are within range of an **objective** you control, that **objective** remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

At the end of your Movement phase, for each **TYRANIDS SYNAPSE** unit from your army, you can select one friendly **GENESTEALER CULTS** unit (excluding **PURESTRAIN GENESTEALER** and **PATRIARCH** units) and one friendly **TYRANIDS** unit each within 9" of and visible to that Synapse unit. If you do, that **GENESTEALER CULTS** unit from your army suffers D3+1 mortal wounds and one model in the selected **TYRANIDS** unit regains up to that many lost wounds and until the start of your next Movement phase, each time a model in the selected **TYRANIDS** unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

**TYRANIDS** units from your army have the following ability:

**Catalyst** (**Aura**): While an enemy unit is within 6" of this unit, each time a friendly **GENESTEALER CULTS** unit makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.

For each **ACOLYTE HYBRIDS**, **HYBRID METAMORPHS** and **NEOPHYTE HYBRIDS** unit from your army, while one or more **CHARACTER** models are leading that unit, you can re‐roll Advance and Charge rolls made for it. If that **CHARACTER** model is a **MAGUS**, **PRIMUS** or **ACOLYTE ICONWARD**, that model has the Feel No Pain 3+ ability while leading that unit.

• Friendly Kelermorph/Locus/Reductus Saboteur/Sanctus models have Killer.
  • Friendly Killer models’ attacks can:
    • Re‑roll hit rolls of 1.
    • Re‑roll wound rolls of 1.
text.de:
• Befreundete Kelermorph-/Locus-/Reductus-Saboteur-/Sanctus-Modelle haben Killer.
  • Für die Attacken befreundeter Killer-Modelle können:
    • Trefferwürfe von 1 wiederholt werden.
    • Verwundungswürfe von 1 wiederholt werden.
text.es:
• Las miniaturas Kelermorfo/Locus/Saboteadora Reductus/Sanctus amigas tiene Homicida.
  • En los ataques de las miniaturas Homicida amigas se pueden:
    • Repetir las tiradas para impactar de 1.
    • Repetir las tiradas para herir de 1.
text.fr:
• Les figurines de Kelermorphe/Locus/Saboteur Reductus/Sanctus amie ont le mot-clé Tueur.
  • Les attaques des figurines de Tueur amies peuvent :
    • Relancer les jets de touche de 1.
    • Relancer les jets de blessure de 1.
text.it:
• I modelli di Kelermorfo/Locus/Sabotatore Reductus/Sanctus amici hanno Sicario.
  • Gli attacchi dei modelli di Sicario amici possono:
    • Ripetere i tiri per colpire pari a 1.
    • Ripetere i tiri per ferire pari a 1.
text.ja:
• 味方ケラーモーフ/ローカス/リダクトゥス・サバター/サンクトゥス・兵はキラーを持つ。
  • 味方キラー・兵の攻撃は以下が可能になる：
    • ヒットロールの出目1をリロールする。
      • ウーンズロールの出目1をリロールする。
text.ko:
• 아군 협객변형체/보좌/공작파괴원/세례자 모델에 처단자를 부여합니다.
  • 아군 처단자 모델의 공격에 다음을 적용할 수 있습니다.
    • 값이 1인 명중 굴림 재굴림
    • 값이 1인 타격 굴림 재굴림
text.zh:
• 己方杀戮兵器/基卫/隐蔽破坏者/圣裁者 模型拥有杀手关键词。
  • 己方杀手模型的攻击可以：
    • 重掷结果为 1 的命中掷骰。
    • 重掷结果为 1 的致伤掷骰。

text.en: In your Command phase, if a friendly Neophyte Hybrids unit is within a terrain area, that unit heals 3 wounds. This detachment has the HOSTS tag and cannot be taken with another HOSTS detachment.
text.de: Wenn sich in deiner Befehlsphase eine befreundete Neophyten-Hybriden-Einheit in einem Geländebereich befindet, wird jene Einheit um 3 Lebenspunkte geheilt. Dieses Kontingent hat die Kennzeichnung Scharen und kann nicht zusammen mit einem anderen Kontingent mit der Kennzeichnung ­Scharen gewählt werden.
text.es: En tu fase de mando, si una unidad Híbridos Neófitos amiga está en un área de terreno, se cura 3 heridas. Este destacamento tiene la etiqueta HUESTES y no puede incluirse junto a otro destacamento HUESTES.
text.fr: À votre phase de Commandement, si une unité d’Hybrides Néophytes amie est dans une zone de terrain, elle soigne 3 points de vie. Ce détachement a l'étiquette Ost et ne peut pas être pris avec un autre détachement d'Ost.
text.it: Nella tua fase di Comando, se un’unità di Ibridi Neofiti amica si trova entro un’area di terreno, quell’unità guarisce 3 ferite. Questo distaccamento ha il descrittore Schiere e non può essere preso con un altro distaccamento Schiere.
text.ja: 自軍側指揮フェイズ中、地形エリアの中にいる味方ネオファイト・ハイブリッド・ユニットは、負傷限界を3ポイント回復する。 このデタッチメントは巣族の群れタグを持ち、他の巣族の群れタグを持つデタッチメントと同時に編制できない。
text.ko: 플레이어의 지휘 페이즈, 아군 개종자 혼종 유닛이 지형 범위 내에 있다면, 그 유닛은 3 체력을 회복합니다. 이 디태치먼트에 군세 태그가 부여되며 다른 군세 디태치먼트와 함께 선택할 수 없습니다.
text.zh: 在己方指挥阶段中，若一个己方混血新信徒单位位于一个地形区域内，那个单位治疗 3 处耐伤。 本分遣队拥有大军标签，并且不能与另一个拥有大军标签的分遣队被一同纳入军队中。

text.en: Each time a **GENESTEALER CULTS** unit from your army is set up on the battlefield as Reinforcements, until the end of your next Fight phase, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** and **[IGNORES COVER]** abilities.

name.ja: ピュアストレインの大巣群

target.en: One **ASTRA MILITARUM** and one **GENESTEALER CULTS** unit from your army that have not been selected to shoot this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Select one enemy unit that is visible to both of those selected units and within range of at least one ranged weapon from each of those units. Until the end of the phase, models in those units can only make attacks that target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target). When doing so, each time such a model makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

fluff.en: As the Broodmind coordinates their timing, martial and insurrectionist comrades target their chosen victims in volleys of mutually supportive firepower.

target.en: One **ABERRANTS**, **BIOPHAGUS** or **PURESTRAIN GENESTEALERS** unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a **MONSTER** or **VEHICLE**, add 1 to the Wound roll.

fluff.en: The raw strength of those infused with the Patriarch’s distilled power is undeniable when directed against the foe’s hulking tools of tyranny.

target.en: One **ABERRANTS**, **BIOPHAGUS** or **PURESTRAIN GENESTEALERS** unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Pile-in or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3". In addition, it does not need to end that move closer to the closest enemy model, provided it ends it as close as possible to the closest enemy unit.

fluff.en: Evidence of the bio-horror taint in their veins, the most blessed of a cult exhibit an inhuman swiftness.

when.en: Your Charge phase.

effect.en: Your unit has +2 to **charge rolls**.

fluff.en: Triggered by xenos bio-stimms flooding their bodies, when the cult’s predators spring their trap, the jaws close inescapably.

target.en: One **GOLIATH ROCKGRINDER** or **GOLIATH TRUCK** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

fluff.en: With evasive manoeuvres and split-second repairs, Outlander Claws marshal their rugged vehicles through the worst the foe can throw at them.

target.en: One **GENESTEALER CULTS MOUNTED** or **GENESTEALER CULTS VEHICLE** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability while targeting an enemy unit within 18".

fluff.en: A cult’s experienced outriders are experts in hit-and-run attacks and close-range firefights. These skills are deadly when combined.

target.en: One **ACHILLES RIDGERUNNERS** or **ATALAN JACKALS** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

fluff.en: Serpent-fast, jinking and swerving with incredible skill, the cult’s light vehicles appear to slide through the oppressor’s gunfire.

target.en: One **GENESTEALER CULTS** unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit, re‑roll a Wound roll of 1. If one or more friendly **TYRANIDS** units are within 6" of that enemy unit, you can re‑roll the Wound roll instead.

fluff.en: Goaded by the newly ascendant Hive Mind, the cultists fight with greater fury even as their muscles tear and organs rupture under the strain.

target.en: One **TYRANIDS CHARACTER** unit from your army that was destroyed by that enemy unit this phase. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has shot or fought.

effect.en: Until the end of the battle, each time a **GENESTEALER CULTS** model from your army makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

fluff.en: Some amongst the cult still retain enough sentience and zeal to feel rage and a need for vengeance if they see the Star Children slain.

target.en: That **GENESTEALER CULTS** unit.

when.en: Your Charge phase, when a friendly **GENESTEALER CULTS** unit within 12" of a friendly **engaged** **TYRANIDS** unit **declares a charge**.

effect.en:
• Your unit has +1 to **charge rolls**.
  • You can use this part of this **stratagem**. If you do:
    • Your unit can re-roll **charge rolls**.
    • Your unit must end that **charge move** **engaged** with an enemy unit **engaged** with that friendly **TYRANIDS** unit.

fluff.en: Cultists dash madly into the fighting without a care for their survival, drawn onward to aid the vanguard organisms by a will they cannot resist.

target.en: One **ACOLYTE HYBRIDS**, **HYBRID METAMORPHS** or **NEOPHYTE HYBRIDS** unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, improve the Attacks and Weapon Skill characteristics of melee weapons equipped by models (excluding **CHARACTERS**) in your unit by 1 and those weapons have the **[HAZARDOUS]** ability.

fluff.en: The faithful will gladly hurl themselves into harm’s way, frenziedly dragging the foe down.

target.en: Two **GENESTEALER CULTS** units from your army that have not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.

when.en: The start of your Shooting phase or the start of the Fight phase.

effect.en: Select one enemy unit (if this Stratagem is used in the Fight phase, that enemy unit must be within Engagement Range of both of your units). Until the end of the phase, each time a model in either of your units makes an attack, it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target for that attack), and when resolving that attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

fluff.en: A tenet of guerrilla warfare is the concentration of even inferior firepower to inflict maximum harm.

target.en: One **GENESTEALER CULTS** units from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, a Critical Hit is scored on an unmodified Hit roll of 5+, instead of only a 6.

fluff.en: The broodkin have been trained and equipped for this moment, with weapons readied for Ascension.

target.en: That destroyed **CHARACTER** model. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.

when.en: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit destroys a **GENESTEALER CULTS CHARACTER** model from your army.

effect.en: Roll one D6: on a 2+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds. If that **CHARACTER** model is an **ABOMINANT** or **PATRIARCH**, that enemy unit suffers 2D3 mortal wounds instead.

fluff.en: There are few more holy virtues in the cult’s eyes than to use one’s final act to lay low the oppressor.

target.en: One other **GENESTEALER CULTS CHARACTER** model from your army.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit destroys a **GENESTEALER CULTS CHARACTER** model from your army.

effect.en: Until the end of the battle, each time a friendly **ACOLYTE HYBRIDS**, **HYBRID METAMORPHS** or **NEOPHYTE HYBRIDS** model makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If the destroyed model was a **MAGUS**, **PRIMUS** or **ACOLYTE ICONWARD**, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

fluff.en: Should one of the Patriarch’s inner coven fall, those that remain are swift to call for lethal retribution.

target.en: One **ASTRA MILITARUM VEHICLE** unit from your army.

when.en: Any phase, just after an enemy unit ends a move within 9" of one or more of your Cult Ambush markers.

effect.en: Select one of those Cult Ambush markers. You can set up that Cult Ambush marker anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 8" horizontally away from all enemy units and wholly within 6" of your unit.

fluff.en: Hulking armoured war engines provide ideal cover to launch a well-timed ambush.

target.en: That **INFANTRY** unit. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an **ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY REGIMENT** unit from your army (excluding **ARTILLERY** and **CHARACTER** units) is destroyed.

effect.en: Roll one D6: on a 3+, place one Cult Ambush marker anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 8" horizontally away from all enemy units (if this is not possible, no marker is placed) and add a new unit to your army identical to your destroyed unit, in Cult Ambush, at its Starting Strength, with all of its wounds remaining and any **[ONE SHOT]** weapons those models are equipped with considered as not having been shot.

restrictions.en: You can only use this Stratagem once per battle.

fluff.en: Xeno-tainted soldiers have long learned to lurk in the shadows, ready to attack when the cult calls.

target.en: That **ASTRA MILITARUM** unit.

when.en: Your Shooting phase, just after an **ASTRA MILITARUM** unit from your army has shot.

effect.en: Select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the turn, that enemy unit cannot be targeted with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem and each time a **GENESTEALER CULTS** unit from your army selects that enemy unit as a target of a charge, you can re-roll the Charge roll.

fluff.en: Disciplined salvoes of fire can drive the foe into cover, leaving them vulnerable to the rest of the cult.

target.en: One **ASTRA MILITARUM** or **GENESTEALER CULTS** unit from your army (excluding **MONSTERS** and **VEHICLES**) within 12" of that enemy unit.

when.en: Reinforcements step of your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit is set up on the battlefield from Reserves.

effect.en: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

fluff.en: Forewarned of the enemy’s sudden onset by spies in their ranks or by the Brood Brothers’ own strategos, the cult’s faithful evade potential catastrophe.

target.en: Select one of those Cult Ambush markers.

when.en: Any phase, just after an enemy unit ends a move within 9" of one or more of your Cult Ambush markers, before removing those markers from the battlefield.

effect.en: You can set up that Cult Ambush marker anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units.

fluff.en: Adaptive and intelligent, the purest of a cult’s broods can evade their foes to find new avenues of ingress.

target.en: One **ABERRANTS**, **BIOPHAGUS** or **PURESTRAIN GENESTEALERS** unit from your army.

when.en: Start of your opponent’s Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy unit within 9" of your unit is selected to shoot, it must take a Leadership test, subtracting 1 from the result. If that test is failed, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that enemy unit makes an attack that targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

fluff.en: Face to face with hideous genetic monstrosities, their full horror can shake even the most stoic soul.

target.en: Select one of those Cult Ambush markers.

when.en: Any phase, just after an enemy unit ends a move within 9" of one or more of your Cult Ambush markers.

effect.en: You can set up that Cult Ambush marker anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 8" horizontally away from all enemy units.

fluff.en: With raw speed and subtle misdirection, Atalan Jackals outflank those who believe them trapped.

target.en: One **ACHILLES RIDGERUNNERS** or **ATALAN JACKALS** unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit.

when.en: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.

effect.en: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

fluff.en: An Outlander Claw’s skilled riders and crews can use their enhanced hybrid reactions to rapidly alter speed and course, roaring after fleeing prey or luring enemy out of position and leaving them flat-footed.

target.en: One **GENESTEALER CULTS MOUNTED** or **GENESTEALER CULTS VEHICLE** unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units and is wholly within 9" of one or more battlefield edges.

when.en: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.

effect.en: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

fluff.en: Skirting the edge of battle, an Outlander Claw’s raiders watch keenly for vulnerabilities, ready to throw themselves back into the fight to exploit any weaknesses in the enemy.

target.en: One **TYRANIDS** unit from your army.

when.en: Start of any phase.

effect.en: Until the start of your next Command phase, increase the range of your unit’s Catalyst ability by 3.

restrictions.en: Each time you use this Stratagem, until the end of your next Command phase, you cannot use this Stratagem again.

fluff.en: As the Tyranid invasion gathers pace, the influence of the Hive Mind surges like waves rolling ever higher onto a desolate shore.

target.en: One **TYRANIDS** unit from your army.

when.en: Your Shooting phase or your Charge phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

fluff.en: Like predatory sea beasts lunging from wheeling shoals of fish, the vanguard organisms strike and fade from amidst the cultist hordes repeatedly, picking apart their overwhelmed prey.

target.en: One **GENESTEALER CULTS** or **TYRANIDS** unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

when.en: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.

effect.en: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

fluff.en: Never again will the tunnel networks of the cult provide secret roads for hopeful and idealistic freedom fighters. Yet they can still serve one last time as a means by which the Tyranids and their surviving worshippers can vanish from the battlefield only to strike again elsewhere.

target.en: One **ACOLYTE HYBRIDS**, **HYBRID METAMORPHS** or **NEOPHYTE HYBRIDS** unit from your army that has not declared a charge this phase.

when.en: Your Charge phase.

effect.en:
• If your unit made an **advance**/**fall-back move** this turn, that **advance**/**fall-back move** does not prevent your unit from being **eligible to declare a charge**.
  • When your unit **declares a charge**, you can use this part of this **stratagem**. If you do:
    • Your unit can re-roll **charge rolls**.
    • Your unit must end that **charge move engaged** with an enemy unit **engaged** with a friendly **CHARACTER** unit.

fluff.en: When the cult’s leaders demand devotion, danger and exhaustion are forgotten in the rush to serve.

target.en: One **ACOLYTE HYBRIDS**, **HYBRID METAMORPHS** or **NEOPHYTE HYBRIDS** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the **[ASSAULT]** ability.

fluff.en: Owing to their hypersensory reactions, the cult’s rate of fire increases.

target.en: One **ACOLYTE HYBRIDS** or **NEOPHYTE HYBRIDS** unit from your army that had one or more of its models destroyed as a result of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.

effect.en: Your unit can make a move of up to D6", but it unit must end that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding **AIRCRAFT**). When doing so, models in your unit can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.

fluff.en: Bloody persecution by the oppressors is grist for the mill of the cult’s violent and zealous creed.

target.en: One **GENESTEALER CULTS** unit from your army that is arriving using the Deep Strike ability this phase.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en: Your unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units.

restrictions.en: A unit targeted by this Stratagem is not eligible to declare a charge in the same turn.

fluff.en: The cult can expertly assail seemingly impregnable enemy positions.

target.en: One **GENESTEALER CULTS BATTLELINE** unit from your army in Cult Ambush.

when.en: Your opponent’s Movement phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, when setting your unit up using a Cult Ambush marker, set your unit up anywhere on the battlefield wholly within 6" of that Cult Ambush marker and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

fluff.en: The brood lurks invisibly as the enemy approaches. Not until the last second do they burst from cover to strike.

target.en: One **GENESTEALER CULTS INFANTRY** unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

when.en: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.

effect.en: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

fluff.en: With their task of drawing the oppressors’ fire complete, the surviving cultists melt away, ready to strike again.

target.en: One **GENESTEALER CULTS INFANTRY** unit from your army that was selected as a target of that charge.

when.en: Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit declares a charge.

effect.en: Roll one D6: on a 2-4, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 5+, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

fluff.en: An enemy’s fervour to strike down the faithful of the cult can be turned against them, luring the foe into a region laced with hidden traps and primed explosives.

target.en: One **ASTRA MILITARUM** unit from your army.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of one or more **GENESTEALER CULTS** units from your army. Until the end of the phase, your unit can make ranged attacks that target that enemy unit. If it does, after it has resolved those attacks, roll one D6 for each of those **GENESTEALER CULTS** units: on a 5+, the unit being rolled for suffers D3+1 mortal wounds.

fluff.en: With martial pragmatism and the cult’s victory at stake, Brood Brothers will willingly open fire on the foe even if it endangers infiltrating cells of allies.

target.en: One **ACOLYTE HYBRIDS**, **HYBRID METAMORPHS** or **NEOPHYTE HYBRIDS** unit from your army in Cult Ambush.

when.en: End of your opponent’s Movement phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, you can set up your unit on the battlefield without using a Cult Ambush marker. When doing so, set up your unit anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units.

fluff.en: Such is the creed’s inspirational call to arms that as the foe foil one incursion, another rises for the cause.

target.en: That <k>Purestrain Genestealers</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>ピュアストレイン・ジーンスティーラー</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>纯种基因窃取者</k>单位。

when.en: Your opponent’s Movement phase, when an enemy unit ends a move within 8" of a friendly unengaged Purestrain Genestealers unit.
when.de: Bewegungsphase deines Gegners, wenn eine feindliche Einheit eine Bewegung innerhalb von 8" um eine befreundete Reinerbige-Symbionten-Einheit beendet, die nicht im Nahkampf ist
when.es: En la fase de movimiento del oponente, cuando una unidad enemiga termina un movimiento a 8" o menos de una unidad Genestealers Puros amiga no trabada.
when.fr: À la phase de Mouvement adverse, quand une unité ennemie finit un mouvement à 8" ou moins d’une unité de Genestealers Pure-souche amie non engagée.
when.it: Nella fase di Movimento dell’avversario, quando un’unità nemica termina un movimento entro 8" da un’unità di Genoraptor Puri non ingaggiata amica.
when.ja: 敵軍側移動フェイズ中、敵ユニットが味方の非接敵状態であるピュアストレイン・ジーンスティーラー・ユニットの8mv以内に一部でも入っている位置で移動を終了した時。
when.ko: 상대의 이동 페이즈, 적 유닛이 교전 상태가 아닌 아군 순종 진스틸러 유닛의 8" 내에서 이동을 종료할 때.
when.zh: 在您对手的移动阶段中，当一个敌方单位在一个不处于交战状态的己方纯种基因窃取者单位的 8" 内结束一次移动时。

effect.en: Your unit can make a normal move of up to D3+3".
effect.de: Deine Einheit kann eine normale Bewegung von bis zu W3+3" ausführen.
effect.es: Tu unidad puede hacer un movimiento normal de hasta 1D3+3".
effect.fr: Votre unité peut faire un mouvement normal de D3+3" maximum.
effect.it: La tua unità può effettuare un movimento normale di massimo D3+3".
effect.ja: その自軍側ユニットは、最大D3+3mvまでの通常移動を行える。
effect.ko: 이 유닛은 최대 D3+3"의 일반 이동을 수행할 수 있습니다.
effect.zh: 您的单位可以进行一次最多 D3+3" 的常规移动。

fluff.en: Purestrain Genestealers think and move with horrifying swiftness, darting through the smoke and shadow of the battlefield, remaining always a few steps ahead of their prey.
fluff.de: Reinerbige Symbionten denken und bewegen sich mit furchterregender Schnelligkeit. Sie huschen durch Rauch und Schatten des Schlachtfeldes und sind ihrer Beute stets einen Schritt voraus.
fluff.es: Los Genestealers Puros piensan y se mueven con una velocidad aterradora, surcando el humo y las sombras del campo de batalla, avanzando siempre unos pasos por delante de su presa.
fluff.fr: Les Genestealers Pure-souche pensent et se meuvent à une vitesse horrifiante, en se ruant à travers la fumée et les ombres du champ de bataille, tout en restant à quelques pas de leur proie.
fluff.it: I Genoraptor Puri pensano e si muovono con velocità spaventosa, saettando tra il fumo e le ombre del campo di battaglia in modo da essere sempre qualche passo davanti alla preda.
fluff.ja: ピュアストレイン・ジーンスティーラーは、戦場の煙と影の合間を縫うように駆け抜け、常に獲物の数歩先を行く。その動きは、恐ろしく素早い思考に基づいている。
fluff.ko: 가공할 속도로 사고하고 이동하는 순종 진스틸러들은 전장의 연기와 그림자를 쏜살같이 가로지르면서 항상 사냥감보다 앞서간다.
fluff.zh: 纯种基因窃取者能够以惊人的速度进行思考和移动，在战场的烟云之间奔行，永远都领先在猎物之前。

target.en: One friendly <k>Purestrain Genestealers</k> unit.
target.ja: 味方<k>ピュアストレイン・ジーンスティーラー</k>・ユニット1個。
target.zh: 一个己方<k>纯种基因窃取者</k>单位。

when.en: Start of your opponent’s Movement phase.
when.de: Zu Beginn der Bewegungsphase deines Gegners
when.es: Al inicio de la fase de movimiento del oponente.
when.fr: Au début de la phase de Mouvement adverse.
when.it: All’inizio della fase di Movimento dell’avversario.
when.ja: 敵軍側移動フェイズ開始時。
when.zh: 在您对手的移动阶段开始时。

effect.en: Your unit has ‑6" detection range until the end of the turn.
effect.de: Deine Einheit hat bis zum Ende des Zugs -6" Entdeckungs­reichweite.
effect.es: Tu unidad tiene -6" al alcance de detección hasta el final del turno.
effect.fr: Votre unité a ‑6" en portée de détection jusqu’à la fin du tour.
effect.it: La tua unità ha -6" alla distanza di individuazione fino alla fine del turno.
effect.ja: そのターン終了時まで、その自軍ユニットの発見範囲は-6mvの修正を受ける。
effect.ko: 턴이 종료될 때까지 이 유닛에 발각 범위 -6"를 적용합니다.
effect.zh: 直到回合结束前，您的单位的侦测范围 -6"。

fluff.en: Genestealers can constrict themselves into grotesquely narrow spaces, can crawl across vertical surfaces and hang from ceilings in utter silence, and are rarely seen by their prey before it is altogether too late.
fluff.de: Symbionten können sich in grotesk enge Gänge quetschen, vertikale Oberflächen erklimmen und in völliger Regungslosigkeit von Decken baumeln. Selten bekommt ihre Beute sie zu Gesicht, ehe es zu spät ist.
fluff.es: Los Genestealers pueden meterse en espacios grotescamente estrechos, arrastrarse por superficies verticales y colgarse del techo en absoluto silencio, y rara vez son vistos por sus presas antes de que sea demasiado tarde.
fluff.fr: Les Genestealers peuvent se glisser dans les interstices les plus minces, escalader des surfaces verticales et s'accrocher aux plafonds sans le moindre bruit. Leur proie les voit rarement avant qu'il ne soit trop tard.
fluff.it: I Genoraptor si insinuano in spazi tremendamente angusti, strisciano su superfici verticali e si appendono al soffitto nel più assoluto silenzio; di rado la preda riesce a scorgerli prima che sia troppo tardi.
fluff.ja: ジーンスティーラーはその身を歪め、あり得ぬほど狭い隙間にも潜り込むほか、垂直の壁面を這い、天井から無音でぶら下がることもできる。そして獲物がその姿に気づいた時は、ほぼ手遅れであるといってよいだろう。
fluff.ko: 진스틸러는 신체를 그로테스크할 정도로 수축해 좁은 공간으로 들어갈 수 있을 뿐 아니라 수직면도 타고 기어오를 수 있고, 아무 소리도 내지 않고 천장에 매달릴 수도 있다. 사냥감이 그 존재를 눈치챘을 때는 이미 만사가 늦은 상태다.
fluff.zh: 基因窃取者能够蜷缩身体来穿越极为狭窄的空间，在垂直面上攀爬或悬挂在天花板上，它们悄无声息，等到猎物意识到它们的存在时已经太晚。

target.en: That <k>Purestrain Genestealers</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>ピュアストレイン・ジーンスティーラー</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>纯种基因窃取者</k>单位。

when.en: Your Movement phase, when a friendly Purestrain Genestealers unit is selected to make a fall‑back move.
when.de: Deine Bewegungsphase, wenn eine befreundete Reinerbige-Symbionten-Einheit gewählt wird, eine Rückzugsbewegung auszuführen
when.es: En tu fase de movimiento cuando una unidad Genestealers Puros amiga se elige para hacer un movimiento de retroceder.
when.fr: À votre phase de Mouvement, quand une unité de Genestealers Pure-souche amie est choisie pour faire un mouvement de retraite.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Movimento, quando un’unità di Genoraptor Puri amica viene scelta per effettuare un movimento di ripiegamento.
when.ja: 自軍側移動フェイズ中、味方ピュアストレイン・ジーンスティーラー・ユニットが退却移動を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 이동 페이즈, 아군 순종 진스틸러 유닛이 후퇴 이동 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在您的移动阶段中，当一个己方纯种基因窃取者单位被选择进行一次后撤移动时。

effect.en: That move does not prevent your unit from being eligible to declare a charge.
effect.de: Jene Bewegung verhindert nicht, dass deine Einheit infrage kommt, einen Angriff anzusagen.
effect.es: Ese movimiento no le impide a tu unidad ser apta para declarar cargas.
effect.fr: Ce mouvement n’empêche pas votre unité d’être éligible pour déclarer une charge.
effect.it: Quel movimento non impedisce alla tua unità di essere idonea a dichiarare una carica.
effect.ja: その移動を行った自軍ユニットは突撃を宣言可能である。
effect.ko: 이 유닛은 그 이동에도 불구하고 돌격 선언이 가능합니다.
effect.zh: 那次移动不会阻止您的单位宣布冲锋。

fluff.en: Any sign these vicious aliens are trying to flee is but misdirection as they slip away from their attackers only to pounce once again upon unsuspecting prey.
fluff.de: Jedes Anzeichen, dass diese Bestien einen Fluchtversuch unternehmen könnten, ist nur Irreführung, denn sie ziehen sich nur von ihren Angreifern zurück, um einmal mehr gegen die arglose Beute zuzuschlagen.
fluff.es: Cualquier señal de que estos feroces alienígenas intentan huir es solo una distracción, ya que se alejan de sus atacantes solo para abalanzarse una vez más sobre presas desprevenidas.
fluff.fr: Tout ce qui laisse penser à une fuite de la part de ces xénos est un leurre, car ils ne font que se soustraire à leurs assaillants pour bondir sur une proie insouciante.
fluff.it: Qualsiasi segno che questi malvagi alieni stiano provando a fuggire è soltanto un inganno: si allontanano dagli attaccanti solo per avventarsi su altre prede ignare.
fluff.ja: この獰猛な異種族が退却を図っているかに見える姿は、まったくの欺瞞である。姿を消して追跡を逃れ、獲物が油断したところで再び襲い掛かるための行動にすぎないのだ。
fluff.ko: 이 포악한 외계종이 도망하는 것처럼 보인다면 기만당한 것이다. 이들은 공격자로부터 슬쩍 몸을 뺀 다음, 불의의 일격을 날릴 준비를 할 뿐이다.
fluff.zh: 凡是显示这些凶残异形试图逃离的迹象，皆不过是障眼法；它们借此从攻击者手中溜走，实则是为了再次扑向毫无防备的猎物。

target.en: That <k>Killer</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>キラー</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when a friendly Killer unit is selected to attack.
when.de: In deiner Fernkampfphase oder in der Nahkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Killer-Einheit zum Attackieren gewählt wird
when.es: En tu fase de disparo o en la fase de combate, cuando una unidad Homicida amiga se elija para atacar.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir ou à la phase de Combat, quand une unité de Tueur amie est choisie pour attaquer.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro o nella fase di Combattimento, quando un’unità Sicaria amica viene scelta per attaccare.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、あるいは任意の白兵フェイズ中、味方キラー・ユニットが白兵を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈 또는 백병전 페이즈, 아군 처단자 유닛이 공격 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在您的射击阶段或在近战阶段中，当一个己方杀手单位被选择进行攻击时。

effect.en: Attacks made by <k>KILLER</k> models in your unit have <k>[Devastating Wounds]</k>.
effect.de: Attacken eines <k>KILLER</k>-Modells deiner Einheit haben <k>[Verheerende Verwundungen]</k>.
effect.es: Los ataques de las miniaturas <k>ASESINO</k> de tu unidad tienen <k>[Heridas devastadoras]</k>.
effect.fr: Les attaques effectuées par les figurines de <k>Tueur</k> de votre unité ont <k>[Blessures Dévastatrices]</k>.
effect.it: Gli attacchi effettuati dai modelli di <k>SICARIO</k> della tua unità hanno <k>[Ferite Devastanti]</k>.
effect.ja: 対象の自軍ユニット内の<k>キラー</k>・兵が行なう攻撃は<k>［会心ウーンズ］</k>を持つ。
effect.ko: 이 유닛에 속한 <k>처단자</k> 모델이 수행하는 공격에 <k>[궤멸적 피해]</k>를 부여합니다.
effect.zh: 该己方单位中的<k>杀手</k>模型进行的攻击拥有<k>[毁灭伤害]</k>。

fluff.en: Feeding back through the unnatural connection of the broodmind, the sheer worshipful belief of the masses in the superhuman abilities of their champions actually manifests to empower those very figureheads.
fluff.de: Die schiere Macht des ehrfürchtigen Glaubens der Massen an die übermenschlichen Fähigkeiten ihrer Champions fließt durch das Rottenbewusstsein und manifestiert sich tatsächlich in zusätzlicher Stärke für jene Galionsfiguren.
fluff.es: Retroalimentándose a través de la conexión antinatural de la mente de progenie, la fe ciega y venerable de las masas en las habilidades sobrehumanas de sus campeones se manifiesta y los potencia.
fluff.fr: Grâce au lien surnaturel avec l'esprit-couvain, la croyance des masses dans les aptitudes surnaturelles de leurs champions se manifeste pour renforcer ces derniers.
fluff.it: La fede assoluta delle masse nelle abilità sovrumane dei loro campioni si manifesta tramite la connessione innaturale con la mente della nidiata e potenzia quegli eroi.
fluff.ja: 巣族意識体の異様な繋がりを介して渦巻く大衆の盲信は、かれらが抱く超人的能力への崇拝を現実の力として顕現させ、その象徴たる指導者たちを真に強化する。
fluff.ko: 무리의식과의 초자연적 소통에서 영향을 받은 대중은 진스틸러 용사의 초인적 능력을 열렬하게 믿고 숭배하는데, 그 믿음은 역으로 그 대전사들의 능력을 강화한다.
fluff.zh: 通过族群意志那非自然的连接回馈，大众对于英雄人物所具备的超凡能力所怀有的那种崇拜信念，竟真切地具现化为一种力量，反过来赋予了这些领袖人物以威能。

target.en: That <k>Killer</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>キラー</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Fight phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly <k>Killer</k> unit.
when.de: Nahkampfphase, wenn eine feindliche Einheit eine befreundete <k>Killer</k>-Einheit als Ziel wählt
when.es: En la fase de combate, cuando una unidad enemiga toma como blanco una unidad <k>Homicida</k> amiga.
when.fr: À la phase de Combat, quand une unité ennemie cible une unité de <k>Tueur</k> amie.
when.it: Nella fase di Combattimento, quando un’unità nemica ha come bersaglio un’unità <k>Sicario</k> amica.
when.ja: 白兵フェイズ中、敵ユニットが味方<k>キラー</k>・ユニットを攻撃対象にした時。
when.ko: 백병전 페이즈, 적 유닛이 아군 <k>처단자</k> 유닛을 대상으로 지정할 때.
when.zh: 在近战阶段中，当一个敌方单位将一个己方<k>杀手</k>单位选为目标时。

effect.en:
When a Killer model in your unit is destroyed, if your unit has not been selected to fight this phase, roll one D6:
  • On a 1, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.
  • On a 2+, do not remove that model from the battlefield. When your unit has fought, or at the end of the phase (whichever comes first), that model is removed from the battlefield.
effect.de:
Wenn ein Killer-Modell deiner Einheit zerstört wird und deine Einheit in dieser Phase noch nicht zum Kämpfen gewählt wurde, wirf einen W6:
  • Bei einer 1 erleidet jene feindliche Einheit 1 tödliche Verwundung.
  • Bei 2+ entferne jenes Modell nicht vom Schlachtfeld. Wenn deine Einheit gekämpft hat oder am Ende der Phase (was auch immer zuerst eintritt), wird jenes Modell vom Schlachtfeld entfernt.
effect.es:
Cuando una miniatura Homicida de tu unidad es eliminada, si tu unidad no se ha elegido para combatir en esta fase, tira 1D6:
  • Con un 1, esa unidad enemiga sufre 1 herida mortal.
  • Con 2+, no retires esa miniatura del campo de batalla en este momento; retírala después de que su unidad haya combatido o al final de la fase (lo que ocurra antes).
effect.fr:
Quand une figurine de Tueur de votre unité est détruite, si votre unité n’a pas été choisie pour combattre à cette phase, jetez un D6 :
  • Sur un résultat de 1, cette unité ennemie subit 1 blessure mortelle.
  • Sur 2+, ne retirez pas cette figurine du champ de bataille. Une fois que votre unité a combattu, ou à la fin de la phase (selon ce qui advient en premier), cette figurine est retirée du champ de bataille.
effect.it:
Quando un modello Sicario della tua unità viene distrutto, se la tua unità non è stata scelta per combattere in questa fase, tira un D6:
  • Con 1 quell’unità nemica subisce 1 ferita mortale.
    • Con 2+ non rimuovere quel modello dal campo. Esso viene rimosso dopo che la tua unità ha combattuto, oppure alla fine della fase (ciò che avviene prima).
effect.ja:
その自軍のユニット内のキラー・兵が撃破された時、その自軍ユニットがこのフェイズ中にまだ白兵を宣言していない場合、D6を1個ロールする：
  • ロール結果が1の場合、その敵ユニットは1ポイントの致命的ダメージを受ける。
  • ロール結果が2+であれば、その兵を戦場から取り除かない。その自軍ユニットが白兵を行うか、そのフェイズ終了時のいずれかの条件が満たされた時点で、その兵を戦場から取り除く。
effect.ko:
이 유닛의 처단자 모델이 파괴될 때, 이번 페이즈에 이 유닛이 백병전 수행을 위해 지정되지 않았다면, D6를 하나 굴리고 다음을 적용합니다.
  • 값이 1이면, 그 적 유닛은 1 치명상을 입습니다.
  • 값이 2+이면 그 모델은 전장에서 바로 제거되지 않습니다. 이 유닛이 백병전 수행을 종료했을 때 또는 페이즈 종료 시(어느 하나라도 충족 시) 이 모델을 전장에서 제거합니다.
effect.zh:
在您单位中的杀手模型被摧毁时，如果该单位在本阶段中没有被选择进行近战，掷一枚 D6：
  • 如果结果为 1，那个敌方单位受到 1 处致命伤。
  • 如果结果为 2+，那么不要将那个模型移出战场。在该单位完成近战后，或者在阶段结束时（以先发生者为准），将那个模型移出战场。

fluff.en: Even caught firmly within the jaws of death, still this champion of the cult lives up to their reputation for deadly skill and utter devotion to the cause.
fluff.de: Selbst wenn er dem Tode nah ist, bleibt dieser Champion seinem Ruf gerecht, ein mörderischer Kämpfer zu sein, der ganz den Zielen des Kults verschrieben ist.
fluff.es: Incluso atrapado en las fauces de la muerte, este campeón del culto hace honor a su reputación de habilidad letal y absoluta devoción a la causa.
fluff.fr: Même dans les mâchoires de la mort, ce champion du culte reste à la hauteur de sa réputation de tueur entièrement dévoué à la cause.
fluff.it: Anche quando si trova tra le fauci della morte, questo campione del culto tiene fede alla sua reputazione di combattente micidiale e devoto alla causa.
fluff.ja: この教団の筆頭戦士は死の淵に追い込まれようとも、その殺意に満ちた技能と揺るがぬ信念を捨てることなく、最後まで忠誠を貫く。
fluff.ko: 목숨이 경각에 달린 그 순간에조차, 교단의 이 용사는 명성 그대로 뛰어난 무용을 발휘하면서 멸사봉공한다.
fluff.zh: 尽管已经走向死亡，教派的英雄们依旧会维持自身的致命名声和绝对忠诚。

name.es: A la altura de la leyenda
name.fr: À la Hauteur de la Légende

target.en: That <k>Killer</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>キラー</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when a friendly Killer unit has attacked, if those attacks destroyed an enemy unit or an enemy Character model.
when.de: In deiner Fernkampfphase oder in der Nahkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Killer-Einheit attackiert hat und durch jene Attacken eine feindliche Einheit oder ein feindliches Charaktermodell zerstört wurde.
when.es: En tu fase de disparo o la fase de combate, cuando una unidad Homicida amiga haya atacado, si esos ataques eliminaron alguna unidad enemiga o alguna miniatura Personaje enemiga.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir ou à la phase de Combat, quand une unité de Tueur amie a attaqué, si ces attaques ont détruit une unité ennemie ou une figurine de Personnage ennemie.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro o nella fase di Combattimento, quando un’unità Sicaria amica attacca, se quegli attacchi distruggono un’unità nemica o un modello di Personaggio nemico.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中または白兵フェイズ中、味方キラー・ユニットが攻撃を行った時、その攻撃が敵ユニット1個または敵キャラクター・兵1体を撃破した場合。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈 또는 백병전 페이즈, 아군 처단자 유닛이 공격을 수행했고, 그 공격으로 적 유닛 또는 적 캐릭터 모델을 파괴했을 때.
when.zh: 您的射击阶段或近战阶段中，在一个己方杀手单位完成攻击，并且这些攻击摧毁了一个敌方单位，或者一个敌方角色模型时。

effect.en: Each visible friendly battle-shocked GENESTEALER CULTS unit within 12" of your unit is no longer battle-shocked.
effect.de: Jede sichtbare erschütterte befreundete SYMBIONTENKULT-Einheit innerhalb von 12" um deine Einheit ist nicht länger erschüttert.
effect.es: Las unidades CULTOS GENESTEALER amigas acobardadas visibles a 12" o menos de tu unidad ya no están acobardadas.
effect.fr: Chaque unité des Cultes Genestealers ébranlée amie qui est visible et à 12" ou moins de votre unité n'est plus ébranlée.
effect.it: Ogni unità Traumatizzata dei CULTI DEI GENORAPTOR visibile amica entro 12" dalla tua unità non è più traumatizzata.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットの12mv以内に一部でも入っており、視認状態であり、戦闘ショック状態である味方の各ジーンスティーラー・カルト・ユニットは戦闘ショック状態ではなくなる。
effect.ko: 이 유닛의 시야에 들어오며 12" 내에 있고 전투충격 상태인 아군 진스틸러 컬트 유닛은 전투충격 상태에서 벗어납니다.
effect.zh: 每个位于该己方单位 12" 内且对其可见的己方处于战斗震慑状态的基因窃取者教派单位不再处于战斗震慑状态。

restrictions.de: Du kannst diese Gefechtsoption nicht mehr als einmal pro Schlacht einsetzen.
restrictions.es: No puedes usar esta estratagema más de una vez por batalla.
restrictions.fr: Vous ne pouvez pas utiliser ce stratagème plus d’une fois par bataille.
restrictions.ja: 自軍はこの策略をバトル中1回限り使用できる。
restrictions.ko: 이 스트라타젬은 전투당 한 번만 사용할 수 있습니다.
restrictions.zh: 您在每场战斗中使用该计谋的次数不能超过一次。

fluff.en: Few sights are more inspiring to the downtrodden yet fanatical masses of the Genestealer Cult than seeing their folk heroes striking down their oppressors.
fluff.de: Nur wenige Anblicke sind für die unterdrückten und doch fanatischen Massen des Symbiontenkultes erhabener als ihre Helden, die den Tyrannen den Tod bringen.
fluff.es: Pocas imágenes inspiran más a las masas oprimidas pero fanáticas del Culto Genestealer que ver a sus héroes del pueblo abatir a sus opresores.
fluff.fr: Rares sont les spectacles plus galvanisants pour la populace fanatique d’un Culte Genestealer que de voir ses héros abattre les oppresseurs.
fluff.it: Poche cose esaltano le cenciose masse di fanatici del Culto dei Genoraptor quanto vedere i propri eroi abbattere gli oppressori.
fluff.ja: 虐げられながらも狂信に浸るジーンスティーラー・カルトの群衆にとって、民衆の英雄が抑圧者を打ち倒す光景ほど鼓舞されるものはない。
fluff.ko: 억압에 멍들었으나 광신적 신앙을 품은 진스틸러 컬트의 무리에게 있어 민중 영웅이 압제자를 쓰러뜨리는 것만큼 감동적인 일은 없다.
fluff.zh: 对于受压迫者而言，没有什么能比基因窃取者教派的英雄杀死暴君要更激励人心的了。

target.en: That <k>Neophyte Hybrids</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>ネオファイト・ハイブリッド</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly Neophyte Hybrids unit with every model within a terrain area.
when.de: Die Fernkampfphase deines Gegners, wenn eine feindliche Einheit eine befreundete Neophyten-Hybriden-Einheit als Ziel wählt, von der sich jedes Modell in einem Geländebereich befindet
when.es: En la fase de disparo del oponente, cuando una unidad enemiga tome como blanco una unidad Híbridos Neófitos amiga que tenga todas sus miniaturas en un área de terreno.
when.fr: À la phase de Tir adverse, quand une unité ennemie cible une unité d’Hybrides Néophytes amie dont toutes les figurines sont dans une zone de terrain.
when.it: Nella fase di Tiro dell’avversario, quando un’unità nemica sceglie come bersaglio un’unità di Ibridi Neofiti amica che ha tutti i modelli all’interno di un’area di terreno.
when.ja: 敵軍側射撃フェイズ中、敵ユニットが、エリア地形内にすべての兵が入っている味方ネオファイト・ハイブリッド・ユニットを攻撃対象として選択した時。
when.ko: 상대의 사격 페이즈, 모든 모델이 지형 범위 내에 있는 개종자 혼종 유닛을 적 유닛이 대상으로 지정할 때.
when.zh: 在对手的射击阶段中，当一个敌方单位对一个单位中所有模型都位于地形区域内的己方混血新信徒单位进行攻击时。

effect.en: Ranged attacks that target your unit have -1 AP until that unit has attacked.
effect.de: Fernkampfattacken gegen deine Einheit haben -1 DS, bis jene Einheit attackiert hat.
effect.es: Los ataques a distancia que tomen como blanco tu unidad tienen -1 a FP hasta que esa unidad haya atacado.
effect.fr: Les attaques de tir qui ciblent votre unité ont -1 en PA jusqu'à ce que l'unité ait attaqué.
effect.it: Gli attacchi da tiro che hanno come bersaglio la tua unità hanno -1 VP finché quell’unità nemica non ha attaccato.
effect.ja: その敵ユニットの射撃攻撃が終わるまでの間、その自軍ユニットを対象とする射撃攻撃は【貫】に-1の修正を受ける。
effect.ko: 이 유닛을 대상으로 지정하는 원거리 공격에 관통 -1을 적용합니다.
effect.zh: 在那个单位完成攻击前，对该单位进行的远程攻击的 AP属性 -1。

fluff.en: Used to being downtrodden, to creeping secretively through the shadows and hiding from authority, these Neophyte Hybrids are almost preternaturally skilled at making use of battlefield cover.
fluff.de: Diese Neophyt-Hybriden sind gewöhnt daran, den Kopf unten zu halten und sich vor Autoritäten zu verstecken, weshalb sie nahezu übernatürlich geschickt darin sind, die Schlachtfelddeckung zu nutzen.
fluff.es: Acostumbrados a ser oprimidos, a arrastrarse entre las sombras, y a esconderse de la autoridad, estos híbridos neófitos son sobrenaturalmente hábiles para utilizar la cobertura del campo de batalla.
fluff.fr: Habitués à l’oppression, à ramper dans l’ombre et à se dissimuler des autorités, ces Hybrides Néophytes ont un talent naturel pour exploiter le couvert sur le champ de bataille.
fluff.it: Abituati ad essere calpestati, ad aggirarsi di nascosto tra le ombre e a nascondersi dall’autorità, questi Ibridi Neofiti sono abili nello sfruttare al meglio la copertura sul campo di battaglia.
fluff.ja: このネオファイト・ハイブリッドたちは長年の迫害経験から影の中に潜み、当局の目をかいくぐることに慣れている。このため、戦場の遮蔽物を利用する技においては、ほとんど超常的と言えるほどに熟練しているのだ。
fluff.ko: 탄압 아래 짓밟히는 데에, 그림자 사이를 비밀스럽게 기어다니고 당국의 눈길을 피하는 데에 익숙한 개종자 혼종들이 전장의 엄폐물을 활용하는 실력은 거의 초자연적일 정도다.
fluff.zh: 这些混血新信徒已经习惯受到压迫的生活，懂得如何隐藏于暗影和躲避权威的追捕，因此也能够十分有效地利用战场上的掩体。

target.en: One friendly Neophyte Hybrids unit within a terrain area.
target.es: 1 unidad Híbridos Neófitos amiga que esté en un área de terreno.
target.fr: Une unité d’Hybrides Néophytes amie dans une zone de terrain.
target.it: Un’unità di Ibridi Neofiti amica entro un’area di terreno.
target.ja: 地形エリア内にいる味方ネオファイト・ハイブリッド・ユニット1個。
target.ko: 지형 범위 내에 있는 아군 개종자 혼종 유닛 하나.
target.zh: 位于一个地形区域内的一个己方混血新信徒单位。

when.en: Start of your Shooting phase.
when.es: Al inicio de tu fase de disparo.
when.fr: Au début de votre phase de Tir.
when.it: All’inizio della tua fase di Tiro.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ開始時。
when.zh: 在您的射击阶段开始时。

effect.en: Enemy units within that terrain area have +6" detection range.
effect.es: Las unidades enemigas en esa área de terreno tienen +6" al alcance de detección.
effect.fr: Les unités ennemies dans cette zone de terrain ont +6" en portée de détection.
effect.it: Le unità nemiche entro quell’area di terreno hanno +6" alla distanza di individuazione.
effect.ja: その地形エリア内にいる敵ユニットの発見範囲は+6mvの修正を受ける。
effect.ko: 그 지형 범위 내에 있는 적 유닛에 발각 범위+6"를 적용합니다.
effect.zh: 位于那个地形区域内的敌方单位的侦测范围 +6"。

fluff.en: Equipped with a wealth of local knowledge, it is no great task for these Neophytes to make out the positions of the unbelievers and report their presence to the cult.
fluff.de: Für diese ortskundigen Neophyten ist es ein Leichtes, die Positionen der Ungläubigen auszumachen und ihre Gegenwart an den restlichen Kult zu verraten.
fluff.es: Equipados con un vasto conocimiento local, no es tarea difícil para estos Neófitos determinar la posición de los infieles e informar de su presencia al culto.
fluff.fr: Nantis de connaissance étendue des environs, ces Néophytes n’ont aucun mal à débusquer les mécréants et à rapporter leurs positions au culte.
fluff.it: Forti di una grande conoscenza del territorio, per questi Neofiti è semplice individuare i miscredenti e comunicarne la posizione al culto.
fluff.ja: このネオファイトたちは、現地に関する知識を豊富に有しているため、不信心者たちの位置を割り出したり、その存在を教団に知らせることは然程の難事ではない。
fluff.ko: 지역의 상황에 환한 이 개종자들에게 있어 불신자들의 위치를 파악해 교단에 보고하는 것쯤은 아무 것도 아니다.
fluff.zh: 这些教徒熟知当地的地形，能够轻松发觉不信者的位置并将这些信息上报回教派。

target.en: That <k>Neophyte Hybrids</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>ネオファイト・ハイブリッド</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Neophyte Hybrids unit is selected to shoot.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Neophyten-Hybriden-Einheit zum Schießen gewählt wird
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad Híbridos Neófitos amiga se elige para disparar.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité Hybrides Néophytes amie est choisie pour tirer.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro, quando un’unità di Ibridi Neofiti amica viene scelta per tirare.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方ネオファイト・ハイブリッド・ユニットが射撃を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈, 아군 개종자 혼종 유닛이 사격 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在您的射击阶段中，当一个己方混血新信徒单位被选择进行射击时。

effect.en: Select one enemy unit. Your unit’s ranged attacks that target that enemy unit can re‑roll hit rolls.
effect.de: Wähle eine feindliche Einheit. Für Fernkampfattacken deiner Einheit gegen jene feindliche Einheit können Trefferwürfe wiederholt werden.
effect.es: Elige 1 unidad enemiga. En los ataques a distancia de tu unidad que tomen como blanco esa unidad enemiga se pueden repetir las tiradas para impactar.
effect.fr: Choisissez une unité ennemie. Les attaques de tir de votre unité qui ciblent l’unité ennemie peuvent relancer les jets de touche.
effect.it: Scegli un’unità nemica. Gli attacchi da tiro della tua unità che hanno come bersaglio quell’unità nemica possono ripetere i tiri per colpire.
effect.ja: 敵ユニットを1個選択する。その自軍ユニットの射撃攻撃が、選択された敵ユニットを攻撃対象としている場合、ヒットロールをリロールしてもよい。
effect.ko: 적 유닛 하나를 지정합니다. 그 적 유닛을 대상으로 한 이 유닛의 원거리 공격은 명중 굴림을 재굴림할 수 있습니다.
effect.zh: 选择一个敌方单位。您的单位在对那个敌方单位进行远程攻击时可以重掷命中掷骰。

fluff.en: Driven wild with hate and fervour, the hybrids unleash a veritable storm of criss-crossing fire into their loathed foe.
fluff.de: Die Hybriden sind von Hass und Fanatismus getrieben und entfesseln ein verheerendes Kreuzfeuer auf ihre Feinde.
fluff.es: Impulsados ​​por el odio y el fervor, los híbridos desatan una verdadera tormenta de fuego cruzado contra su odiado enemigo.
fluff.fr: Poussés par la haine et la ferveur, les hybrides déchaînent une grêle de tirs croisés sur leurs ennemis jurés.
fluff.it: In preda all’odio e alla furia, gli ibridi scatenano contro i nemici una vera e propria tempesta di fuoco.
fluff.ja: 憎悪と狂信によって駆り立てハイブリッドたちは仇敵に向けて、正真正銘の嵐というべき十字砲火を解き放つ。
fluff.ko: 증오와 열정에 몸이 단 혼종들이 혐오스러운 적을 향해 폭풍과 같은 십자포화를 퍼붓는다.
fluff.zh: 在仇恨与狂热的激励下，混血者将可恨的敌人掩埋在交叉火力的风暴之中。

description.en: Patriarch model only. This unit’s attacks can re‑roll wound rolls of 1.
description.de: Nur für ein Patriarch-Modell. Für Attacken dieser Einheit können Verwundungswürfe von 1 wiederholt werden.
description.es: Solo miniatura Patriarca. En los ataques de esta unidad se pueden repetir las tiradas para herir de 1.
description.fr: Figurine de Patriarche seulement. Les attaques de cette unité peuvent relancer les jets de blessure de 1.
description.it: Solo modelli di Patriarca. Gli attacchi di questa unità possono ripetere i tiri per ferire pari a 1.
description.ja: パトリアーク・兵のみ。このユニットの攻撃のウーンズロールの出目1をリロールできる。
description.ko: 교부 모델 전용. 이 유닛의 공격은 값이 1인 타격 굴림을 재굴림할 수 있습니다.
description.zh: 仅限族长模型。该单位的攻击可以重掷结果为 1 的致伤掷骰。

description.en: Magus/Primus model only. This unit’s attacks can re‑roll damage rolls.
description.de: Nur für ein Magus-/Primus-Modell. Für Attacken dieser Einheit können Schadenswürfe wiederholt werden.
description.es: Solo miniatura Magus/Primus. En los ataques de esta unidad se pueden repetir las tiradas de daño.
description.fr: Figurine de Magus/Primus seulement. Les attaques de cette unité peuvent relancer les jets de dégâts.
description.it: Solo modelli di Magus/Primus. Gli attacchi di questa unità possono ripetere i tiri per i danni.
description.ja: メイガス/プリムス・兵のみ。このユニットはダメージ量決定ロールをリロールできる。
description.ko: 선도자/대주교 모델 전용. 이 유닛의 공격은 피해 굴림을 재굴림할 수 있습니다.
description.zh: 仅限占星师/领军模型。该单位可以重掷攻击的伤害掷骰。

name.ja: 準備された秘匿位置（アップグレード）

description.en: Neophyte Hybrids unit only. This unit has -3" detection range.
description.de: Nur für eine Neophyten-Hybriden-Einheit. Diese Einheit hat -3" Entdeckungsreichweite.
description.es: Solo unidad Híbridos Neófitos. Esta unidad tiene -3" al alcance de detección.
description.fr: Unité d’Hybrides Néophytes seulement. Cette unité a -3" en portée de détection.
description.it: Solo unità di Ibridi Neofiti. Questa unità ha -3" alla distanza di individuazione.
description.ja: ネオファイト・ハイブリッド・兵のみ。このユニットの発見範囲は-3mvの修正を受ける。
description.ko: 개종자 혼종 유닛 전용. 이 유닛에 발각 범위 -3"를 적용합니다.
description.zh: 仅限混血新信徒单位。该单位的侦测范围 -3"。

description.en: Kelermorph/Reductus Saboteur model only. This unit’s ranged attacks have +2 S.
description.de: Nur für ein Kelermorph-/Reductus-Saboteur-Modell. Fernkampf­attacken dieser Einheit haben +2 S.
description.es: Solo miniatura Kelermorfo/Saboteadora Reductus. Los ataques a distancia de esta unidad tienen +2 a F.
description.fr: Figurine de Kelermorphe/Saboteur Reductus seulement. Les attaques de tir de cette unité ont +2 en F.
description.it: Solo modelli di Kelermorfo/Sabotatore Reductus. Gli attacchi da tiro di questa unità hanno +2 Fo.
description.ja: ケラーモーフ/リダクトゥス・サバター・兵のみ。このユニットの射撃攻撃の【攻】は+2の修正を受ける。
